headline: How The Callaway Golf (CALY) Story Is Shifting With New Targets Products And Buybacks
summary: The fair value estimate for Callaway Golf has shifted from US$16.05 to US$16.35, putting the modeled price target in the mid teens and closer to where much of the recent Street work has been clustering. That move is in line with analysts who view current levels as broadly consistent with their updated perspectives on the golf consumer and Callaway Golf’s ability to address questions around market share and profitability. Read on to see how you can track these changing targets and the evolving...
